title: mesynium australe
side_effects: Mesynium australe can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its high saponin content. Ingestion of large quantities can also lead to headaches, dizziness, and fatigue. Additionally, improper use of the plant can result in allergic reactions, including skin irritation, and respiratory problems, such as wheezing and coughing. Long-term misuse of mesynium australe may also contribute to liver and kidney damage.
